title: Mysterious Signal

narrative.intro: Your crew picks up a mysterious signal from an abandoned research facility. The signal appears to be a distress call, but something about it feels wrong - the encryption is military grade, far too sophisticated for a simple research station.
narrative.briefing: Investigate the source of the signal at the abandoned research facility. Be prepared for hostile scavengers who may have already claimed the site.
narrative.completion_success: You've secured the facility and discovered encrypted data logs that hint at something far bigger than a simple research project.
narrative.completion_failure: You were forced to retreat, but the signal continues to broadcast. Whatever secrets lie within remain hidden... for now.

primary.description: Reach the signal source (marked terminal) and download the data
primary.completion_requirement: One crew member must spend 1 full activation at the terminal

bonus.description: Eliminate the scavenger leader for additional evidence

special_item.name: Encrypted Data Chip
special_item.description: Contains encrypted research data that may prove valuable

tutorial_context: This is your first Story Track mission. Use the Battle Journal to track evidence and the Objective Display to monitor your progress.
